top_signals.title: Gold Slumps Below $4,200 as Renewed US-Iran Clashes Test Truce
top_signals.summary: Gold extended a decline after the US launched strikes against Iran in retaliation for the downing of a military helicopter, jeopardizing efforts to end the war that’s roiled global markets and raised inflation risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Decline Before CPI, Gold Drops on Fed Bets: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks resumed their slide as technology shares remained under pressure and investors trimmed positions ahead of a key inflation reading in the US. Gold dropped.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Women and leadership: widening the pipeline
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: New concierge service and visa scheme unveiled to help Britain’s fastest-growing firms scale and attract talent
top_signals.summary: Concierge service for business launched as part of mission to bring about the UK's first trillion-dollar firm.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BP investors push for change at ‘mismanaged kingdom’
top_signals.summary: Lack of detail on why Albert Manifold was fired sows doubts over culture overhaul
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tech Selloff an Opportunity: BlackRock's APAC Head
top_signals.summary: BlackRock Head of Asia Pacific Susan Chan describes the selloff in tech stocks as an "opportunity", saying markets have proven to be resilient over time. (Source: Bloomberg)
